title: Coconut Lime Velvety Bliss
description: A quick-fix Nordic dish featuring desiccated coconut blended with lime juice for a citrusy and velvety texture that's low-fat-friendly.

ingredients.name: Desiccated Coconut
ingredients.notes: Grate fresh coconut or use pre-grated desiccated coconut

ingredients.name: Lime Juice
ingredients.notes: Freshly squeezed lime juice can be used for extra flavor

ingredients.name: Low-Fat Yogurt
ingredients.notes: Greek yogurt or low-fat plain variety works well

ingredients.name: Agave Nectar (or Honey)
ingredients.notes: Optional sweetener for added flavor, can be omitted if preferred

ingredients.name: Cinnamon Powder
ingredients.notes: For a touch of warmth and depth

instructions: Combine desiccated coconut and lime juice in a blender.
Add low-fat yogurt, agave nectar (if using), and cinnamon to the blended mixture.
Blend all ingredients until smooth and creamy, adding more yogurt if needed for desired consistency.
Serve immediately or store in an air-tight container for up to 24 hours.
